title: US-Iran war news LIVE: Explosive drone strike hits Iranian Kurdish opposition camp in Iraq, says report
content:
• On Saturday, the Joint Maritime Information Center elevated the security threat level in the Strait of Hormuz to "substantial" and widened the Omani transit route for two-way vessel traffic.
• Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) launched missile and drone operations against eight US military installations, including the Ali Al Salem Airbase in Kuwait and the US Fifth Fleet headquarters in Bahrain.
• An interim US-Iran peace agreement, reached earlier this month, established a 60-day period for negotiations, with Iran announcing it would regulate maritime traffic in the Strait of Hormuz and deal more firmly with violating vessels.
